argentina.note: Messi (hamstring) and Alvarez (ankle) carrying knocks; Martinez set to start with a fractured finger. All cleared but managed.

canada.note: (auto) Davies has not played for Canada since March 2025, when he tore an ACL in the CONCACAF Nations League finals, and injured a hamstring last month while playing for Bayern

paraguay.note: (auto) Julio Enciso avoided a serious thigh injury, but Paraguay is unlikely to rush its star attacker back into action.

morocco.note: (auto) Morocco could be without one of its top attacking weapons after Ezzalzouli picked up a knee injury in the team's final tune-up match before the World Cup.

senegal.note: Camp reportedly unsettled by off-field issues clouding the campaign; squad talent intact (Mane, Koulibaly, Mendy).

norway.note: Haaland fit and scoring (4-1 v Iraq); captain Odegaard cleared after an injury-hit club season.
